top_signals.title: Toll Brothers Up As Luxury-Home Orders Hit Highest in Two Years
top_signals.summary: Toll Brothers shares rose as much as 5% in postmarket trading on Tuesday after the luxury homebuilder reported second-quarter profit that beat analysts’ estimates and raised its full-year guidance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
